title: lathyrus debilis var. gracilis
intro: Lathyrus debilis var. gracilis, also known as the slender pea or narrow pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting antioxidant defenses, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus debilis var. gracilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
